name: Delegation Worker Result Merger
description: Merges multiple worker_result_package records into a worker_merge_review_package with status counts, merged outputs, artifacts, errors, worker run links, budget totals, budget exhaustion details, retry attempts, and review flags.

inputSchema.name: Worker Result Packages
inputSchema.description: List of worker_result_package records produced by delegated workers.

inputSchema.name: Merge Goal
inputSchema.description: Optional goal that explains what the parent graph needs from the merged worker results.

inputSchema.name: Expected Output Schema
inputSchema.description: Optional output keys expected by the parent graph.

inputSchema.name: Review Policy
inputSchema.description: Optional deterministic review policy such as require_all_succeeded or require_outputs.

outputSchema.name: Worker Merge Review Package
outputSchema.description: Merged worker review package for downstream graph nodes.

outputSchema.name: Merge Review Report
outputSchema.description: Short human-readable audit report for run details and output nodes.
